activities.name: cp_source_to_stage
activities.description: Copies data from source to stage.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat('select tranact.varTransactionNo as TransactionNo,							
       invLocationtxt.varLocationName as LocationName,							
       tranact.dteTransactionDate as TransactionDate,							
       usertxt.varFirstName as FirstName, usertxt.varLastName as LastName,
      entity.varEntityID as EntityId,				
       usertxt.varEmployeeNo as EmployeeNo,							
       crafttxt.varCraft as craft,	
       partno.varPartNo as partNo,							
       parttxt.varDescription as Description,							
       parttxt.varUserField1 as ident,							
       invID.varInventoryID as ItemID,							
       TranTyTx.varTransactionType as TransactionType, 			
       retStatTxt.varReturnStatus as varReturnStatus,						
       tranactDtl.intQty as Qty,							
       tranactDtl.decUnitCost as UnitCost, 							
       tranactDtl.decTotalCost as TotalCost,							
       tranactDtl.dteDueDateTime as DueDate,						
       jobtxt.varJobNumber as Job,				
       subjobtxt.varsubJobNumber as SubJob,					
       costcodetxt.varCostcodeNumber as CostCode,					
       costcodetxt.varCostCode as CostCodeDesc,							
      					
       tranact.varReference as Reference					
from [dbo].[tblTransaction] tranact							
  inner join [dbo].[tblLocationText] invLocationtxt on tranact.intLocationID = invLocationtxt.intLocationID							
  inner join [dbo].[tblTransactionDetail] tranactDtl on tranact.intTransactionID = tranactDtl.intTransactionID							
  inner join [dbo].[tblInventoryID] invID on tranactDtl.intInventoryIdID = invID.intInventoryIdID							
  inner join [dbo].[tblInventory] partno on  invID.intInventoryID = partno.intInventoryID 							
  inner join [dbo].[tblInventoryText] parttxt on parttxt.intInventoryID = partno.intInventoryID							
  inner join [dbo].[tblTransactionTypeText] TranTyTx on parttxt.varLocaleID = TranTyTx.varLocaleID  and tranactDtl.intTransactionTypeID = TranTyTx.intTransactionTypeID							
  inner join [dbo].[tblPersonnel] puser on tranact.intCreatedUserID = puser.intPersonnelID							
  inner join [dbo].[tblPersonnelText] usertxt on tranact.intCreatedUserID = usertxt.intPersonnelID							
  left join [dbo].[tblCraftText] crafttxt on parttxt.varlocaleID = crafttxt.VarLocaleID and puser.intCraftID = crafttxt.intCraftID							
  left join [dbo].[tblReturnStatusText] retStatTxt on parttxt.varlocaleID = retStatTxt.VarLocaleID and tranactDtl.intReturnStatusID = retStatTxt.intReturnStatusID							
  left join [dbo].[tblJobtext] jobtxt on parttxt.varlocaleID = jobtxt.VarLocaleID and tranact.intJobID = jobtxt.intJobID							
  left join [dbo].[tblSubJobtext] subjobtxt on parttxt.varlocaleID = subjobtxt.VarLocaleID and tranact.intsubJobID = subjobtxt.intsubJobID							
  left join [dbo].[tblCostCodeText] costcodetxt on parttxt.varlocaleID = costcodetxt.VarLocaleID and tranact.intCostCodeID = costcodetxt.intCostCodeID							
  left join [dbo].[tblEntity] entity on tranact.intEntityID = entity.intEntityID							
							
where tranact.dteModifiedDate >= ''', activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.last_run_start_date,'''')

activities.name: sp_update_parameter
activities.description: Updates the parameters and it's values
